bird.summary: The feline owlet-nightjar (Aegotheles insignis) is a species of bird in the order Aegotheliformes and the family Aegothelidae. It is found…

locations.name: 新幾內亞島
locations.summary: 新畿內亞島（英語：New Guinea；巴布亞皮欽語：Niugini；印尼語：Papua）位於澳大利亞北面，是世界上第二大島嶼與最高島嶼。有時，本島亦被稱為「巴布亞」，但有時巴布亞亦單指本島的一部份。此外，印尼官方过去稱呼本島為「伊里安岛…

relations.subject: Feline owlet-nightjar
relations.evidence: It is found in New Guinea

relations.subject: Feline owlet-nightjar
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Feline owlet-nightjar
relations.evidence: The species is considered to be of least concern, according to the International Union for Conservation of Nature, although its biggest threat is deforestation
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
